sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Quick answers about using Spellvault as an MTG card scanner.

items.title: What is an MTG card scanner?
items.description: An MTG card scanner helps you capture Magic cards and turn them into usable collection records faster.

items.title: Why use Spellvault for MTG card scanning?
items.description: Spellvault combines scanning, inventory, and collection management in one workflow.

items.title: Can I scan many cards in one session?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault is designed for fast intake when you are working through boxes, binders, or collection lots.

items.title: Can I organize cards after scanning?
items.description: Yes. Scanning is only the first step, and you can keep building the collection structure after that.
